TestCase z12Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    if (t1.n > 0 && t1.a != NULL) {
        memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    }
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 1
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    int eligible_indices[follow_case.n];
    int eligible_count = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; i++) {
        if (follow_case.a[i] < 999) {
            eligible_indices[eligible_count] = i;
            eligible_count++;
        }
    }
    if (eligible_count > 0) {
        // Select a random element index among eligible indices
        // Use rand() without seed here; assume environment provides srand if needed
        int rand_index = eligible_indices[rand() % eligible_count];
        follow_case.a[rand_index] = 999;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
